Astroflux Wiki
Guides Systems Stations Enemies Bosses Weapons Items Artifacts Drops Media Map

Unique Artifacts

Sprites come from the GameFS atlas, and unique stat families are marked when the client exposes a stable mapping.

Unique artifactStat / effectBossesCrateSource status
AdvectorianFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheAdvectorian artifact rolls 6Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match
Armorlock ProtocolStationary damage reduction: Adds damage reduction while stationary.
damageReductionWhileStationaryUnique		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Bloodline SurgeOn-kill surge: Kills grant a short stackable damage and mitigation boost.
bloodlineSurge		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactDirect unique stat
Bullwark PrismUnique low shield reduction: Adds damage reduction when shields are low.
damageReductionWithLowShieldUnique		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
CleanerFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheThe Cleaner artifact rolls 6-10Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match
Crown of XhersixCleansing crown: Automatically cleanses debuffs on a timer.
crownOfXhersix		Three Emperors artifact rolls 10Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match + unique stat
DominatorFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheDominator artifact rolls 1-3Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match
Eternal AegisUnique damage reduction: Reduces incoming damage.
damageReductionUnique		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Fist of ZharixKill shockwave: Kills trigger a shockwave that damages nearby enemies.
fistOfZharix		Three Emperors artifact rolls 10Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match + unique stat
Hyper Acid SplicerCorrosive ignite: Corrosive hits can splice the hull for extra corrosive damage.
corrosiveChanceToIgnite		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Impact Emitter CoreSlow debuff: Hits can slow enemy movement for 4 seconds.
slowDown		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Legacy CoreLegacy ship upgrade: Legacy hull, shield, and armor upgrade for ships.
upgrade		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Lunacite CoreLucanite core: Weapons can reduce the target's outgoing damage for 4 seconds.
lucaniteCore		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactDirect unique stat
Mantis CoreClose target damage core: Adds damage when the target is close.
mantisCore		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactDirect unique stat
MotherbrainOvermind: Doubles pet count and increases pet health.
overmind		Mother Brain artifact rolls 6Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match + unique stat
Omega Shield DriverEnergy shield overload: Energy hits can overload shields for extra energy damage.
energyChanceToShieldOverload		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Phase NullifierKinetic shield penetration: Kinetic hits can bypass shields and deal part of the kinetic damage directly to hull.
kineticChanceToPenetrateShield		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Plasma Disruptor RelicEnergy resistance debuff: Weapons can reduce target energy resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceEnergyResistance		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Ring of YxthalKinetic resistance debuff: Weapons can reduce target kinetic resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceKineticResistance		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Scourgebinder CoreCorrosive resistance debuff: Weapons can reduce target corrosive resistance for 4 seconds.
reduceCorrosiveResistance		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
TefatFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheTefat artifact rolls 1, 1, 1Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match
Thermofang CoreBurning target kinetic core: Adds kinetic damage against burning targets.
thermofangCore		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactDirect unique stat
Time Flux RelicFixed stat not exposed by the downloaded client cacheNo direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactSprite only
Titanheart CoreUnique low health reduction: Adds damage reduction when health is low.
damageReductionWithLowHealthUnique		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat
Veil of YhgvisCloak ambush veil: Gives damage reduction while cloaked and bonus ambush damage.
veilOfYhgvis		Three Emperors artifact rolls 10Crate Unique ArtifactBoss sprite match + unique stat
Velocity CoreVelocity core: Large ship speed increase.
velocityCore		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactDirect unique stat
Virex InjectorUnique debuff damage: Increases damage dealt by debuffs.
dotDamageUnique		No direct boss name match in client dataCrate Unique ArtifactInferred unique stat

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
